sql.isNotEqual: AND DEPARTMENT NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%trash\_dept%' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)

sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE PROXYUSERID = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND StartDate < #nowDate# AND EndDate > #nowDate# ) > 0

select.isEqual: SELECT REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;','a=1;') as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT
CN
DISPLAYNAME
DISPLAYNAME2
MAIL
MAILNICKNAME
UPNNAME
DEPARTMENT
DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION2
DESCRIPTION3
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME
COMPANY
COMPANY2
TITLE
TITLE2
TELEPHONENUMBER
HOMEPHONE
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER
MOBILE
POSTALCODE
STREETADDRESS
INFO
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15
ADSPATH
SIPURI
UPDATEDT
CREATEDT
MOBILE_ENABLE
MOBILE_NOTUSE
MOBILE_PIN
POSITIONCD
BIRTH
BIRTHTYPE
PASSWORD
IPADDRESS
LASTLOGIN
LOGINCNT
TENANT_ID
MANUAL_FLAG
LISTTYPE
PASSWORD_UPDATEDT
FURIGANA
EXTENSIONPHONE
OFFICEMOBILE
MAILBOXQUOTA
MAILBOXUSAGE
PASSWORD2
PHOTO_UPDATEDT
USERTREEFLAG
FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT
CN
DISPLAYNAME
DISPLAYNAME2
MAIL
MAILNICKNAME
UPNNAME
DEPARTMENT
DESCRIPTION
DESCRIPTION2
DESCRIPTION3
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME
COMPANY
COMPANY2
TITLE
TITLE2
TELEPHONENUMBER
HOMEPHONE
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER
MOBILE
POSTALCODE
STREETADDRESS
INFO
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15
ADSPATH
SIPURI
UPDATEDT
CREATEDT
MOBILE_ENABLE
MOBILE_NOTUSE
MOBILE_PIN
POSITIONCD
BIRTH
BIRTHTYPE
PASSWORD
IPADDRESS
LASTLOGIN
LOGINCNT
TENANT_ID
MANUAL_FLAG
LISTTYPE
PASSWORD_UPDATEDT
FURIGANA
EXTENSIONPHONE
OFFICEMOBILE
MAILBOXQUOTA
MAILBOXUSAGE
PASSWORD2
PHOTO_UPDATEDT
USERTREEFLAG
FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT
CN
DISPLAYNAME
DISPLAYNAME2
USEFLAG
MAIL
COMPNM2
DEPTLEVEL
DEPT_CD_PATH
DEPT_NM_PATH
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15
ADFLAG
ADSPATH
UPDATEDT
CREATEDT
TENANT_ID
MANUAL_FLAG
DEPTTREEFLAG
USEUPPERDEPTBOX
DEPTTREEFLAG
USEUPPERDEPTBOX
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT A.* FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 <> CN
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%'
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

SELECT A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , A.TYPE FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , 'dept' TYPE , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%' AND CN NOT LIKE 'trash\_dept\_%'
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A ORDER BY A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DISPLAYNAME

select.isEqual: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, extensionattribute7 JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))), IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, b.jobid JOBID, b.roleid ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, extensionattribute7 JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))), IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, b.jobid JOBID, b.roleid ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 JOBID, 'ROLEID' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , A.MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))), IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'user' TYPE, B.JOBID JOBID, B.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , MAIL , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'dept' TYPE, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME ASC

SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , TYPE, jobid, roleid, isaddjob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 jobid, 'ROLEID' roleid, '' isaddjob, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))), IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, b.jobid jobid, b.roleid roleid, 'Y' isaddjob, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME LIMIT #v_STARTROWForMySQL#, #v_COUNT#

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE, '' jobid, '' isaddjob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME LIMIT #v_STARTROWForMySQL#, #v_COUNT#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 jobid, 'ROLEID' roleid, '' isaddjob, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0'))), IFNULL(B.ORDERBY, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'USER' TYPE, b.jobid jobid, b.roleid roleid, 'Y' isaddjob, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , 'DEPT' TYPE, '' jobid, '' isaddjob, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA ORDER BY TYPE DESC, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DISPLAYNAME LIMIT #v_STARTROWForMySQL#, #v_COUNT#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(CN) TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND CN <> 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA

SELECT COUNT(cn) totalcount FROM (SELECT C.cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER C WHERE C.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND C.cn <> 'masteradmin' AND C.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND C.department in (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE C.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox_%' AND (LOCATE((SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') from TBL_DEPTMASTER where tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#), dept_cd_path) OR extensionattribute2 = #deptCN#))
AND C.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT D.cn FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER D JOIN TBL_USERMASTER E ON D.tenant_id = E.tenant_id AND D.cn = E.cn WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND D.deptid IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE D.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox_%' AND (LOCATE((SELECT CONCAT(dept_cd_path, ',') FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #deptCN#), dept_cd_path)) OR (extensionattribute2 = #deptCN#))
AND D.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
) AA
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND extensionattribute1 = #deptCN# AND extensionattribute2 = dept_cd_path

SELECT CN , CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DEPTNM , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'dept' TYPE , TENANT_ID as tenantId, deptTreeFlag, USEUPPERDEPTBOX FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = CN

SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS VARCHAR(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , 'user' USERTYPE, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, TEAMSID AS teamsId, UPNNAME AS upnName FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , CAST(B.PROXY AS VARCHAR(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.UPNNAME AS upnName FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

select.isEmpty: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN '0' ELSE '0' END ROLE , '' ROLE1 , '' ROLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , MOBILE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , STREETADDRESS , INFO , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS VARCHAR(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , POSITIONCD , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME1 , 'user' USERTYPE, USERTREEFLAG, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, TEAMSID, UPNNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTCD# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT A.CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , A.DISPLAYNAME2 , A.MAIL , C.CN DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION , C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1 , C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2 , A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME1 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY , C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1 , C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE , B.TITLE TITLE1 , B.TITLE2 TITLE2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.ROLE ELSE B.ROLE2 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , B.ROLE ROLE, B.ROLE ROLE1 , B.ROLE2 ROLE2 , A.TELEPHONENUMBER , A.HOMEPHONE , A.MOBILE , A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , A.STREETADDRESS , A.INFO ,
B.ROLL_INFO AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,
A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , CAST(B.PROXY AS VARCHAR(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , B.JOBID as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , B.ROLEID as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END ORIGIN_ROLE, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , A.ADSPATH , A.UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , SIPURI , B.POSITIONCD , 'addJob' USERTYPE, B.USERTREEFLAG, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, A.TEAMSID, A.UPNNAME FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.DEPTID = #v_DEPTCD# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND B.JOBID = #JOBID# AND B.ROLEID = #ROLEID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT CN , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1 , DISPLAYNAME2 , MAIL , MAILNICKNAME , UPNNAME , DEPARTMENT , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1 , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY , COMPANY COMPANY1 , COMPANY2 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , TITLE TITLE1 , TITLE2 TITLE2 , TELEPHONENUMBER , HOMEPHONE , FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER , MOBILE , STREETADDRESS , POSTALCODE , INFO , REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 'a=0;', 'a=1;') EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 END EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE101 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 , ADSPATH , UPDATEDT , 'user' TYPE , ' ' DISPLAYNAMEPRINTABLE , POSITIONCD , BIRTH , BIRTHTYPE , FURIGANA , EXTENSIONPHONE , OFFICEMOBILE , MANUAL_FLAG AS MANUALFLAG FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = LOWER(#v_CN#) AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE COMPNM2 END COMPANY, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN ROLE ELSE ROLE2 END ROLE FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPTID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #v_PCN# AND A.DEPTID = #v_PDEPT# AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND A.JOBID = #v_jobID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET
CN = #v_PROPVALUE#
DISPLAYNAME = #v_PROPVALUE#
DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
MAIL = #v_PROPVALUE#
MAILNICKNAME = #v_PROPVALUE#
UPNNAME = #v_PROPVALUE#
DEPARTMENT = #v_PROPVALUE#
DESCRIPTION = #v_PROPVALUE#
DESCRIPTION2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
DESCRIPTION3 = #v_PROPVALUE#
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_PROPVALUE#
COMPANY = #v_PROPVALUE#
COMPANY2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
TITLE = #v_PROPVALUE#
TITLE2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
TELEPHONENUMBER = #v_PROPVALUE#
HOMEPHONE = #v_PROPVALUE#
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER = #v_PROPVALUE#
MOBILE = #v_PROPVALUE#
POSTALCODE = #v_PROPVALUE#
STREETADDRESS = #v_PROPVALUE#
INFO = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 = #v_PROPVALUE#
ADSPATH = #v_PROPVALUE#
SIPURI = #v_PROPVALUE#
UPDATEDT = #v_PROPVALUE#
CREATEDT = #v_PROPVALUE#
MOBILE_ENABLE = #v_PROPVALUE#
MOBILE_NOTUSE = #v_PROPVALUE#
MOBILE_PIN = #v_PROPVALUE#
POSITIONCD = #v_PROPVALUE#
BIRTH = #v_PROPVALUE#
BIRTHTYPE = #v_PROPVALUE#
PASSWORD = #v_PROPVALUE#
IPADDRESS = #v_PROPVALUE#
LASTLOGIN = #v_PROPVALUE#
LOGINCNT = #v_PROPVALUE#
TENANT_ID = #v_PROPVALUE#
MANUAL_FLAG = #v_PROPVALUE#
LISTTYPE = #v_PROPVALUE#
PASSWORD_UPDATEDT = #v_PROPVALUE#
FURIGANA = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONPHONE = #v_PROPVALUE#
OFFICEMOBILE = #v_PROPVALUE#
MAILBOXQUOTA = #v_PROPVALUE#
MAILBOXUSAGE = #v_PROPVALUE#
PASSWORD2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
PHOTO_UPDATEDT = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = #v_PROPVALUE#
WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

UPDATE TBL_DEPTMASTER SET
CN = #v_PROPVALUE#
DISPLAYNAME = #v_PROPVALUE#
DISPLAYNAME2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
USEFLAG = #v_PROPVALUE#
MAIL = #v_PROPVALUE#
COMPNM2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
DEPTLEVEL = #v_PROPVALUE#
DEPT_CD_PATH = #v_PROPVALUE#
DEPT_NM_PATH = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 = #v_PROPVALUE#
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 = #v_PROPVALUE#
ADFLAG = #v_PROPVALUE#
ADSPATH = #v_PROPVALUE#
UPDATEDT = #v_PROPVALUE#
CREATEDT = #v_PROPVALUE#
TENANT_ID = #v_PROPVALUE#
MANUAL_FLAG = #v_PROPVALUE#
WHERE
CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) > 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PROXYINFO SET PROXYUSERID = #v_PROXYUSERID#, PROXYUSERNAME = #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, PROXYUSERDEPTID = #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, STARTDATE = #v_STARTDATE#, ENDDATE = #v_ENDDATE# WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROXYINFO ( USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_PROXYUSERID#, #v_PROXYUSERNAME#, #v_PROXYUSERDEPTID#, #v_STARTDATE#, #v_ENDDATE#, #v_TENANT_ID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE USERID = #v_USERID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT
cn, title AS title, birth, birthtype
cn, title2 AS title, birth, birthtype
FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE ((birth LIKE CONCAT('%-', #month#, '-%') AND birthtype = 'Y') OR (birth <> '' AND birthtype = 'N')) AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT
C.displayname AS displayname, A.cn, A.title AS title, C.birth, C.birthtype AS birthtype
C.displayname2 AS displayname, A.cn, A.title2 AS title, C.birth, C.birthtype AS birthtype
FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.deptid = B.cn AND B.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id AND A.cn = C.cn WHERE ((C.birth LIKE CONCAT('%-', #month#, '-%') AND C.birthtype = 'Y') OR (C.birth <> '' AND C.birthtype = 'N')) AND A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.physicaldeliveryofficename <> #companyId# AND A.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId#) ORDER BY SUBSTR(birth, 8, 10)

select.isEqual:
select * from ( SELECT cn, department as displayName, extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, displayName as name, extensionAttribute7 JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQLForMySQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, B.displayName as name, A.JOBID JOBID, A.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strSQLForAddJobForMySQL$
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#)
UNION ALL
SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, displayName as name, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQLForMySQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
LIMIT #pLimit#
) a ORDER BY type DESC, ISADDJOB ASC, NAME ASC

SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER $strSQLForMySQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
LIMIT #pLimit#

SELECT cn, displayName, extensionAttribute15, type, jobid, roleid, isaddjob, extensionAttribute2 FROM (SELECT cn, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END as userName, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, '0' as addJobFlag, 'user' as type, extensionattribute7 JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%' AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CN <> 'masteradmin'
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT a.cn , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END as userName, deptid as displayName , '' as extensionAttribute15, '1' as addJobFlag, 'user' as type, a.jobid JOBID, A.ROLEID ROLEID, 'Y' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_USERMASTER b INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
) AA
ORDER BY AA.addJobFlag, AA.userName LIMIT #startRowForMySQL#, #count#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT cn, department as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, extensionAttribute7 JOBID, '' JOBID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'user' as type, b.jobid JOBID, A.roleid ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT CN, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AA LIMIT #startRowForMySQL#, #count#

SELECT cn, '' as displayName, '' as extensionAttribute15, 'group' as type, '' JOBID, '' ROLEID, '' ISADDJOB,
#companyId# as EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# LIMIT #startRowForMySQL#, #count#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A $strSQL$ AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND A.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id $strSQL$ AND DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
AND B.USERTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND B.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
AND A.DEPTID IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#)
) A

SELECT COUNT(cn) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionattribute1 = #deptID#
AND extensionattribute2 <> CN
AND DEPTTREEFLAG = 'Y'
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT CONCAT('top,Top,', dept_cd_path) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #deptID# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn , cn deptid , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END displayname, CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN displayname ELSE displayname2 END deptnm, displayname displayname1 , displayname2 , mail , compnm2 , extensionattribute1 , extensionattribute2 , CASE #primary# WHEN '1' THEN extensionattribute3 ELSE compnm2 END extensionattribute3, extensionattribute4 , extensionattribute5 , extensionattribute6 , extensionattribute7 , extensionattribute8 , extensionattribute9 , extensionattribute10 , extensionattribute11 , extensionattribute12 , extensionattribute13 , extensionattribute14 , extensionattribute15 , adspath , updatedt , 'dept' type, deptTreeFlag, deptlevel, useupperdeptbox FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT password FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #userID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE mail = #email# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT CONNECTTIME FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC LIMIT 1, 1
SELECT CONNECTIP FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY CONNECTTIME DESC LIMIT 1, 1

SELECT CN , TENANT_ID tenantId FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID# AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #TENANTID#) AND DEPARTMENT = #v_DEPTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 LIKE '%a=1;%'

SELECT USERID, PROXYUSERID, PROXYUSERNAME, PROXYUSERDEPTID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offsetMin# MINUTE) as STARTDATE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offsetMin# MINUTE) as ENDDATE FROM TBL_PROXYINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #deptId#
SELECT DEPT_CD_PATH FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #deptId#
SELECT CN, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 = #extension4#
SELECT CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_PARENTID#, '%') AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND cn = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET LISTTYPE = #listType# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LISTTYPE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID#
SELECT PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT CN, DISPLAYNAME, MAIL, COMPANY FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND (CN LIKE #searchValue# OR DISPLAYNAME LIKE #searchValue#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME
SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ADDJOBMASTER SET PROXY = #proxyInfo# WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept#
AND JOBID = #jobId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT PROXY FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept#
AND TITLE = #title#
SELECT TITLE, TITLE2, ROLE, ROLE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND DEPTID = #dept# AND JOBID = #jobID#
SELECT CN ,DEPARTMENT ,TITLE ,TITLE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT physicaldeliveryofficename FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT ROLL_INFO FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND JOBID = #v_JOBID#

SELECT CN, DEPARTMENT, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 like CONCAT('%', #v_PERMISSION_CODE#, '%')
UNION ALL SELECT CN, DEPTID , ROLL_INFO AS extensionAttribute1, jobID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND ROLL_INFO LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_PERMISSION_CODE#, '%')

SELECT U.CN, D.CN AS DEPARTMENT, J.JOBID AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN J.TITLE ELSE J.TITLE2 END AS TITLE, J.TITLE as TITLE1, J.TITLE2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DESCRIPTION, D.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION1, D.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY, U.COMPANY AS COMPANY1, U.COMPANY2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER J INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = J.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = J.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = J.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER JM ON J.JOBID = JM.JOBID AND J.TENANT_ID = JM.TENANT_ID
WHERE J.CN = #v_CN# AND J.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ORDER BY JM.`TYPE`, JM.SORT, (CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END) ASC

SELECT CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2, MAIL, DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION1, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN COMPANY ELSE COMPANY2 END COMPANY, COMPANY COMPANY1, COMPANY2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END TITLE, TITLE TITLE1, TITLE2 TITLE2, TELEPHONENUMBER, HOMEPHONE, MOBILE, FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, STREETADDRESS, INFO, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, (CASE WHEN EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NULL THEN CAST('' AS VARCHAR(200)) ELSE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 END) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, ADSPATH, UPDATEDT, 'user' TYPE, SIPURI, POSITIONCD, 'user' USERTYPE, IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, '') JOBID, '' JOBTYPE, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 AS ROLEID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS ROLEINFO FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# UNION ALL SELECT A.CN, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME1, A.DISPLAYNAME2, A.MAIL, C.CN DEPARTMENT, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME2 END DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME DESCRIPTION1, C.DISPLAYNAME2 DESCRIPTION2, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 COMPANYID, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 ELSE C.COMPNM2 END COMPANY, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 COMPANY1, C.COMPNM2 COMPANY2, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.TITLE ELSE B.TITLE2 END TITLE, B.TITLE TITLE1, B.TITLE2 TITLE2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER, A.HOMEPHONE, A.MOBILE, A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER, A.STREETADDRESS, A.INFO, B.ROLL_INFO AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4, CAST(B.PROXY AS VARCHAR(200)) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.ADSPATH, A.UPDATEDT, 'user' TYPE, SIPURI, B.POSITIONCD, 'addJob' USERTYPE, B.JOBID AS JOBID, J.TYPE AS JOBTYPE, B.ROLEID AS ROLEID, B.ROLL_INFO AS ROLEINFO FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON B.CN = A.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON C.CN = B.DEPTID AND C.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER J ON J.JOBID = B.JOBID AND J.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
SELECT MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT U.DISPLAYNAME AS N , U.DISPLAYNAME2 AS N2 , D.DISPLAYNAME AS T , D.DISPLAYNAME2 AS T2 , ( SELECT D2.DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D2 WHERE D2.CN = D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND D2.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AS D , ( SELECT D2.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D2 WHERE D2.CN = D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AND D2.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AS D2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER U JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON U.DEPARTMENT = D.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #v_CN# AND U.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT CN, CASE WHEN #lang# = '1' THEN DisplayName WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN DisplayName2 ELSE DisplayName END AS DisplayName, CASE WHEN #lang# = '2' THEN DisplayName ELSE DisplayName2 END AS DisplayName2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE DeptLevel = '1' AND CN != 'Top' ORDER BY LPAD(extensionAttribute15, 20, '0')

select.isEqual:
WITH RECURSIVE DEPT_RECURSIVE AS ( SELECT 'DEPT' AS data1, CN AS data2, DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, '' AS title, '' AS description, '' AS levelName, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS department, DEPTLEVEL AS nodeLevel, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, '' AS textColor, 'i_company' AS icon, '' AS mail, '' AS presence, '' AS upnName, '' AS mobile, '' AS telephoneNumber, '' AS teamsId, '' AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, '' AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DEPT' AS data1, D.CN AS data2, D.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, '' AS title, '' AS description, '' AS levelName, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS department, D.DEPTLEVEL AS nodeLevel, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, '' AS textColor, 'i_company' AS icon, '' AS mail, '' AS presence, '' AS upnName, '' AS mobile, '' AS telephoneNumber, '' AS teamsId, '' AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, '' AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN DEPT_RECURSIVE DR ON D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = DR.data2 WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash_dept%' ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT * FROM DEPT_RECURSIVE
UNION ALL
SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN A.DESCRIPTION WHEN '2' THEN IFNULL(NULLIF(A.DESCRIPTION2, ''), A.DESCRIPTION) WHEN '3' THEN IFNULL(NULLIF(A.DESCRIPTION3, ''), A.DESCRIPTION) ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, A.DEPARTMENT AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, A.INFO AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON A.DEPARTMENT = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE A.DEPARTMENT IN (SELECT data2 FROM DEPT_RECURSIVE) AND A.CN <> 'masteradmin' AND A.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, B.DEPTID AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, A.INFO AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'Y' AS addJob, B.ORDERBY AS sortOrder FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON B.DEPTID = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE B.DEPTID IN (SELECT data2 FROM DEPT_RECURSIVE) AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) AS TREE ORDER BY data1 DESC, nodeLevel ASC, sortOrder ASC, displayName ASC

SELECT 'DEPT' AS data1, CN AS data2, DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, '' AS title, '' AS description, '' AS levelName, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS department, DEPTLEVEL AS nodeLevel, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, '' AS textColor, 'i_company' AS icon, '' AS mail, '' AS presence, '' AS upnName, '' AS mobile, '' AS telephoneNumber, '' AS teamsId, '' AS extensionAttribute10, '' AS chargeBusiness, '' AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = #v_CN# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND DEPT_CD_PATH NOT LIKE '%trash\_dept%'

SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, A.DEPARTMENT AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, A.INFO AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'N' AS addJob, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 AS sortOrder FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON A.DEPARTMENT = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE A.DEPARTMENT = #v_CN# AND A.CN <> 'masteradmin' AND A.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, B.DEPTID AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, A.INFO AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'Y' AS addJob, B.ORDERBY AS sortOrder FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON B.DEPTID = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

SELECT 'USER' AS data1, A.CN AS data2, A.DISPLAYNAME AS displayName, A.TITLE AS title, A.DESCRIPTION AS description, A.POSITIONCD AS levelName, A.DEPARTMENT AS department, DM.DEPTLEVEL + 1 AS nodeLevel, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS nodeIcon, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS extensionAttribute2, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11 AS textColor, '' AS icon, A.MAIL AS mail, UP.PRESENCE AS presence, A.UPNNAME AS upnName, A.MOBILE AS mobile, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS telephoneNumber, A.TEAMSID AS teamsId, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 AS extensionAttribute10, A.INFO AS chargeBusiness, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS physicalDeliveryOfficeName, 'Y' AS addJob, B.ORDERBY AS sortOrder FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER DM ON A.DEPARTMENT = DM.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = DM.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERPRESENCE UP ON A.TEAMSID = UP.ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #v_CN# AND B.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE extensionAttribute1 = #v_CN# AND CASE WHEN #v_ADMINFLAG# = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE USEFLAG END = 'Y'
SELECT UPNNAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET TEAMSID = #v_TEAMSID# WHERE UPNNAME = #v_UPNNAME#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE UPNNAME = #upnname# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
